title: Aurora, 99393, Palm Pals Jolly Elf 5In, Soft Toy, Green
features: Introducing Palm Pals Jolly Elf, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection. Jolly Elf is a green and red coloured cute and cuddly smiling Elf soft toy which is filled with beans that perfectly fit into your palm. Great for a little cuddling!

Palm Pals are soft and extremely touchable toys made with high-quality materials. Jolly Elf is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

This adorable smiling Jolly Elf-soft toy comes under the Palm Pals Seasonal collection. Palm Pals, our best-selling product range, offers a variety of collections like Craving, Pets, Zoo, Critters, Aquatic and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Jolly Elf measures 13cm. This soft toy is a great gift for any occasion, whether it is for Christmas, a birthday or as a general gift. Everyone will fall in love with this adorable green and red coloured elf which has a cute smiling face. This is a hugely collectable range.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
